\tzpentry{ID3383}{Helix Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3383 introduces Helix Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \phi_{helix} = \frac{2\pi}{\lambda}(z_2 - z_1)\tan(\alpha_{helix}) $$
